title: alansmia variabilis
intro: Alansmia variabilis, also known as the variable resurrection fern, is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its unique ability to dry out and revive itself when exposed to water. The medicinal properties of Alansmia variabilis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
